TextENGNew: Akira stood alone on the rooftop after school, when everyone had left... gazing into the distance.

The light of the sun dyed the athletic field a deep red, and the cityscape was visible on the horizon. He caught a glimpse of students getting ready to go home after club activities, and heard their cheers mixed amongst the cries of the higurashi.
It was a typical, peaceful after-school scene. ...Perhaps the reason it looked so melancholic was only because that's how it looked in Akira's heart.
Suddenly, he turned to look over his shoulder...... at the bench behind him. Until last week, that was the favorite spot for the girl he liked.
Not used to seeing the scenery from such a high vantage point, she would happily look down at it from the bench from time to time while having lunch with Chisato and Tama......
Akira's two childhood friends would gather around her to talk and laugh...
The girl in his memories kept shifting between laughing, getting mad, and looking exasperated. Break time was always full of cheer and laughter.
But...... she would likely never sit there again.
With bitter tears on her face..... Chisato had told Akira last week what she heard from her homeroom teacher. That Natsumi would be leaving the school.
...The story of the tragedy at Natsumi's house spread through the entire school shortly after it occurred.
At the same time, her Hinamizawan heritage... was revealed in the worst possible way.
Due to the widespread TV coverage, the students inconsiderately began speculating and spreading senseless rumors about her, as though they'd found the story a source of amusement and ridicule.
...The most damaged people, driven by their own remorse, were Akira's two childhood friends.
"I should have been there for...!!"
She was unable to finish saying that, but... that was the first time Akira had even seen her weep so loudly.

She was usually an optimist, acting like she didn't have a care in the world, but even Akira, who knew how passionate she was and was almost convinced she was a strong girl who never cried in front of anyone... was unbelievably shocked by her show of emotion.
Chisato welled with tears as she cried, venting her emotions to Tamako and Akira in a hoarse voice...
"...I was supposed to be there for her!@k@vS04/37/310300673. And yet I put myself on guard and kept my distance just because I was scared she might be from Hinamizawa!"
"...I couldn't bring myself to face her when she needed help the most!@k@vS04/37/310300675. And I called myself her friend?! What kind of friend doesn't lend a hand in times like these...?!"
"...It's not just your fault, Chisato.@k@vS04/38/310400251. I didn't do anything either... Nothing...!"
Chisato and Tamako both continued blaming themselves and weeping.

...And even though Akira wasn't crying, he felt the same way. All of them had been in a position to help Natsumi. He certainly didn't know how he could have helped, but... there should have been something he could have done for her.
But he didn't, and now he was left trapped in an endless loop of regret and self-loathing for what he'd failed to do...

"...I loved that girl.@k@vS04/37/310300677. It went beyond mere friendship or companionship.@k@vS04/37/310300678. ...When I first met Natsumi, I couldn't believe what I saw. She was the spitting image of that girl. I almost thought she was her reincarnation...!"
She didn't need to tell anyone. ...Akira could remember. That girl she spoke of referred to a lovely girl who'd always followed Chisato around with an innocent smile on her face.
Of course, Chisato doted on her like mad, but... the girl was young and bedridden with an illness.
She fought as hard as she could to live. ...But before Chisato made it to middle school, the girl's short life came to a close with Chisato by her side......
That's why Chisato was so...
"...Chisato... you..."
"I know that... I know I'm being selfish!@k@vS04/37/310300680. I know that girl and Natsumi are different people. I'm well aware there's no connection between them. I know it's all crazy!"

"...But, but I wanted to help her!@k@vS04/37/310300682. She came from a small town, with no friends, and nobody to depend on, but she could depend on me!@k@vS04/37/310300683. For that alone, I... I... uuu... uuuuu!!"
Chisato threw aside her usual persona and started crying... Tamako couldn't say anything to her. She merely offered her a kind, supportive hug.
...And then, drawn in by Chisato's lamentations, her eyes grew red as she sobbed hoarsely.
All Akira could do... was watch over them dejectedly......

Since that day... Chisato and Tamako haven't spoken much. Every time they saw each other's faces it reminded them of Natsumi whether they wanted to or not... Those thoughts naturally put them at a distance.
"......I wonder what I could've done...?"
Suddenly... Akira asked himself a foolish question.
Should he have just asked Natsumi about her heritage and distanced her from her family?
Or maybe he should have stayed with her longer, all day if he needed, and protected her when danger presented itself?
He tried imagining such a scenario... and mocked himself for what an unrealistic notion it was.
There was no way he could have done either. Natsumi's misfortune happened right in her own home.
There was very little room for an outsider like Akira to be involved. Quite the contrary: it was a presumptuous and arrogant pipe dream to even think he could have dealt with it like that.
Even so... Akira clenched his jaw while scratching his hair to relieve the irritating helpless feeling encroaching on his entire body.
...He truly was helpless. Anger ignited and raged like a wildfire in his chest - directed less at the god that meddled with humans' fate and more at how powerless he had been.
On that day...
Even though he saw how abnormal Natsumi was acting, Akira just assumed she wasn't feeling well... and brought her home without asking anything else.
He'd believed it would have been rather rude to pry about the state of a girl's body.
Don't lie, Akira Toudou.
In reality, you were concerned that if you said something insensitive... Natsumi might reject you, right?
Don't make me laugh. ...You were scared.
You simply didn't want to give Natsumi a bad impression after you finally confessed your feelings, didn't you?
By doing nothing, you could at least avoid the risk of making a mistake... isn't that so?
In his head, someone with Akira's face... laughed while saying that to him.
Akira clenched his fists instinctively and trembled as his face warped into a loathsome expression... but he couldn't deny any of it. Everything his doppelganger said was right on the mark.
Besides... at the time, there was a sign.
Despite her stupor, Natsumi had stubbornly tried to keep Akira away from her home. ...No, she didn't want him to see it.
And Akira... remembering the rumors about her and unwilling to get deeply involved, reluctantly parted ways with her there......
If instead he'd dragged her along to go to a park and offered friendly encouragement...
If only he'd been prepared to pry her concerns out of her even if it meant getting shunned or hated...
Perhaps then he wouldn't be here all by himself, moping about how pathetic he was.
"Aahahhahhah!@k@vS04/37/310300658. Well then, Sunday's all yours!@k@vS04/37/310300659. Work hard for Natsumi's sake, ok~?"
"See ya, Akira-chan.@k@vS04/38/310400247. Good luck with Natsumi~."
Both Chisato and Tamako... entrusted Natsumi to Akira.
Both of them believed Akira could do it...
"...Natsumi Kimiyoshi......"
Seeking purity and peace, the name of the one he loved emerged from the depths of his heart and came out as a gentle mutter.
...And the raging desire to see her again erupted from the back of his heart, leaving a rending pain in his chest.
He wanted to see Natsumi.
To see her again, and talk.
And if that came true, then he swore that he wouldn't fail her again! Not this time...!
Clang.
Just then.
Akira heard the sound of a door opening, looked back casually... and then, he froze.
Standing there was... the person he wanted to see...... It was Natsumi.
"Kimiyo... Natsumi......!"
"Good...@k@vS04/36/310101176. You're still here, Toudou-kun."
After saying that, Natsumi looked down hesitantly, squeezing the knob with her fingertips.
...Her dainty shoulders trembled lightly. Akira ran over to her as soon as he saw that, took her hand, pulled her towards him with all his might, and hugged her.
"Natsumi......!"
Once again... Akira said her first name, not "Kimiyoshi."
At first, he was reluctant to say it, but... there was no hesitation the second time.
"......Akira-kun..."
Natsumi was stunned and confused for a while. She leaned feebly against Akira.
However... it was the first time Akira called her name. The feeling was pleasant and painful... She wrapped her arms around his back in acceptance, then buried her face in his chest.
"I'm sorry... Natsumi..."
When he opened his mouth... an apology came out.
It might be meaningless.
The act of apologizing itself is arrogant. It might invoke contempt from her.
...Still, that was the first thing Akira thought of when it came to Natsumi... and that was his strongest feeling.

"...I'm sorry!@k@vS04/39/310200232. I couldn't do anything for you, Natsumi...!@k@vS04/39/310200233. Even though I told you I wanted to know everything about you, I stayed cautious, I was a coward!@k@vS04/39/310200234. ...In the end, you were suffering, and I couldn't help you...!"
"I can't ask you to forgive me.@k@vS04/39/310200236. ...But my feelings will not change.@k@vS04/39/310200237. That's all I wanted to tell you..."
"......Akira-kun."
Natsumi slowly shook her head, her face still buried into Akira's chest. Then she gently looked up at him head on, and smiled at him.

"Don't apologize...@k@vS04/36/310101182. It was my fault.@k@vS04/36/310101183. My fault for being a coward who couldn't tell you that I liked you for a long time.@k@vS04/36/310101184. My fault for being a weakling who couldn't work hard enough to earn her happiness..."
"...Natsumi, you did your best!@k@vS04/39/310200239. Yet I was a coward...!@k@vS04/39/310200240. How am I any different from those who gossiped about you behind your back?"
"I should have listened to your concerns and stood with you!@k@vS04/39/310200242. I should have protected you...!"
Akira could only clench his teeth in regret.
As a man, he couldn't cry about it. Even so, his thoughts for Natsumi overflowed, and he held her in his arms with all his might.
"I'm sorry... Natsumi...!@k@vS04/39/310200244. I... I should have...!!"
Silence enveloped the two of them. The sunset settling on the horizon illuminated their figures with a deep red, casting long shadows along the rooftop.
"Akira-kun... do you like me?"
"I love you."
"More than anyone else?@k@vS04/36/310101188. More than anything?"
"Yeah. More than anyone, more than anything@k@vS04/39/310200247. ...I love you, Natsumi."
Natsumi sighed against Akira's chest.
It was very warm... and strangely beguiling.
Akira was unable to withstand the huge embarrassment and the pounding of his heart, so he instinctively looked away a bit from her bleary eyes.
"...If you love me...@k@vS04/36/310101191. then you won't abandon me...@k@vS04/36/310101192. no matter what happens?"
"Well then..."
Muttering that, Natsumi smiled.
A thin silver thread of saliva... ran down her lip from the edge of her mouth.
It almost looked like blood against the light of the setting sun... Then, that moment.
The hands that had been resting on Akira's back quietly moved around his chest, climbed to his shoulders... then reached up to the back of his neck. And then.
The moment she exhaled that word... Natsumi gripped Akira's Adam's apple and squeezed with all her might!
"...Ahahahahaha.@k@vS04/36/310101197. Akira-kun... you love me, don't you?@k@vS04/36/310101198. Don't you?@k@vS04/36/310101199. I'm right about that, aren't I...?!"
Akira faced those eyes... then shivered and began to doubt his own sanity.
Natsumi was looking right up at him, her face warped into a sneer seeping with fierce killing intent and unfathomable darkness...!!
"Guh... Na...... Natsumi...?!"
"Well?@k@vS04/36/310101201. It's already over, I'll be sent somewhere all alone unable to stay with you I won't have that I won't have that I won't have that!"
"So let's die together, Akira-kun. I'm not scared as long as I'm with you so come on come on let's do it!@k@vS04/36/310101203. You love me, don't you? Right? Isn't that the case?"
"I'm happy now so I don't want my happiness to escape I never never want to let it go!"
"YOU LOVE ME DON'T YOU!!@k@vS04/36/310101206. So we'll die together, together, DIE TOGETHER DIIIE!!!!!"
Natsumi's eyes were wide open and she was breathing hard. She opened her red mouth to reveal her sharp canines. Then her nails bit into Akira's neck, breaking the skin and digging into his flesh.
The intense pain and lack of air was dragging his consciousness away.
Despite still believing that this was an unbelievable nightmare, Akira continued desperately struggling to remove Natsumi's fingers...!
"You like me don't you, you listen to me don't you, you'll help me won't you, you'll make me happy won't you, you love me don't you?"
"Then do as I say and make me happy!@k@vS04/36/310101209. I want to die together with you, so do it for my sake!!@k@vS04/36/310101210. So please please, PLEEEASE!!"
"PLEEEEEASE!!!!!"
Thanks to Natsumi's incredible strength, Akira was now lying face up on the floor.
Her long hair started unraveling and began clinging to his face from above, her eyes open without the slightest trace of sanity as she refused to let him go.
She strangled him with tremendous strength.
No matter how hard he braced his legs, Akira couldn't even verbalize a groan. He gasped with a look of agony on his face.
...And reflected in the pleading look in his eyes when he looked up...
Was the eerily beautiful yet demonic face of the girl he wanted to know everything about, smirking menacingly as though jeering at his desire...!
"...Haah, haah...@k@vS04/36/310101213. Akira-kun... Akira-kun... you said you loved me...@k@vS04/36/310101214. Haah, haah... you love me..."
Natsumi struggled to mutter that with tears in her eyes. ...She tightly clenched her jaw, causing fresh blood to overflow from the edge of her mouth... leaving a number of stains on Akira's cheeks.
Dull black blood fell onto his face.
"Uugeeh... I AMM... A DEMON... AND YET...@k@vS04/36/310101216. YOU LOVE MEE...@k@vS04/36/310101217. Uuugeeehhh!!!!!"
Could that... really be Natsumi?!
Was this the true form of the Natsumi Kimiyoshi he wanted so desperately to see agaiiiiiiin?!
"...Guaah!!"
"Kyaaaaaah?!"

Akira called back his fading consciousness while mustering all his remaining strength to push Natsumi away. The moment a gap between Natsumi and himself opened, he immediately headed toward the rooftop entrance. ...However,
Natsumi...... was clasping his ankle with ferocious strength...!
"Na-Natsu...?!"
"...Aaaahahahahahahahahahahaha!@k@vS04/36/310101220. Aahahahahahahahahahahahahahah!!@k@vS04/36/310101221. ...Where are you goooooing, A k i r a - k u n...?!"
Giggling in an odd voice... Natsumi staggered to her feet.
"...Where are you goooing...?!@k@vS04/36/310101223. Akira-kuuun...?!"
"...Running away... eehehehehehe...!@k@vS04/36/310101225. Playing taaag...?!@k@vS04/36/310101226. Ahahahahahahahahahah!!"
The wind kicked up and made a lot of noise. Natsumi's hair began to stand on one side.
Each strand reached out like tentacles searching for prey...
"Eheheheheheheheheheheheheheehehehehee...!!@k@vS04/36/310101228. Hyahyahyahyahyahyahyahyahyah...!!@k@vS04/36/310101229. Aaaahahahahahahahahahahahahahahah!!!"
"...Na-Na... Natsumi..."
Overwhelmed by her deranged laughter, Akira lost the strength in his legs and fell to the ground.
Natsumi slowly walked up while looking down at him arrogantly, then straddled him. She reflected on her laughter as she reached for Akira's throat...!
"......Akira-kun...@k@vS04/36/310101231. Heeheheheehehehee...@k@vS04/36/310101232. I've caught yoooou......!!"
...Her nails audibly dug into his throat. Akira's eyes went bloodshot as Natsumi moved her face closer and closer, as if trying to pierce his chest.
What was that... that horrible, distorted face?!
Goosebumps erupted from Akira's back. His blood vessels seemed to freeze over as a chill ran all through his body.
"...I see... I see now..."
Seeing Akira trembling with fear and disgust, Natsumi muttered in a voice that sounded like she had slightly regained her sanity. But what came out next was a calm yet bloodcurling voice...
"You already... hate me, don't you...?@k@vS04/36/310101235. Has everyone abandoned me... and ran away...?!@k@vS04/36/310101236. Uuuuuuu... Aki...... you're abandoning... me too... w... why...?!"
"...Stop this... already..."
"SO SAD... WHY... DOES EVERYONE ABANDON ME...?"
"I JUST... WANTED TO BE HAPPY...!!@k@vS04/36/310101239. ...BEECAUUSE I'M... A DEMON...?!@k@vS04/36/310101240. ...BEECAUUSE I'M... A DEMON...?!@k@vS04/36/310101241. ...A DEMOOON...!!"
Natsumi groaned as if she was possessed. However, Akira's mind was ensnared and he couldn't move.
His feelings for Natsumi, the terror in front of him, determination, madness, the demon in front of him...... his erratic jumble of emotions threatened to burst from his very blood vessels...
"...Natsumi... let's stop this... already..."
Natsumi's eyes... narrowed. She then placed her hands on his Adam's apple as she shivered with rage and terror.
"...As I thought..."
"You lied you lied to me when you said you loved me you were lyiiiiiiing!!!@k@vS04/36/310101245. Everyone hates me, everyone hates me, hates, hates, hates, absolutely hates me!!"
"Ahahahahahahahahahahahaha, ahahahahaha, ahahahahahahahahahahahahahahah!!"
Natsumi crouched down on the spot as her defeaning screams roared.
"...I AMM...@k@vS04/36/310101248. A DEMON... THE LAST DEMON... DEMON...@k@vS04/36/310101249. DEMON DEMON DEMON DEEMON DEEMON DEEMON DEEEEGOEEEGHIII!!"
Natsumi scratched at her throat with her long fingernails.
"GOEEEUEEIGYAAAHIIKUUEEEH!!!"
...Natsumi cried out in a booming voice that filled the air.
Blood splattered from her torn neck... her nails broke through to her throat and dug into the cross-section of broken skin.
Natsumi moaned as she coughed up blood, then lost her balance on the crimson pool pouring at her feet.
......When Akira finally came back to his senses...... the entire area was dyed bright red with blood.
Bright red blood dripped down all over Akira's body.

He was an empty shell completely devoid of any remaining sensations and emotions. But even so... the shock from his total denial of the tragedy that unfolded right before him left him unable to blink.
Look closely... Akira.
You wanted to know everything about Natsumi? Well, you got your wish...!
Now that you know everything... can you still... say you love her?!
Bright red tears of blood... poured from Natsumi's eyes... like waterfalls...
"...Uuoegyaeegueuougaaageehoonguooeegyaonnguoeeeee!!!"
......She was screaming her death throes.
Blood gushed out of her as she spewed even more blood with her screams.
The more violently she writhed, the more merciless and deeper her nails dug into her neck. They chiseled away at the inflamed chunks of red meat emerging from the gaping gash on her neck.
Fresh blood and muddy bodily fluids erupted from Natsumi's body... and gushed out as far as the eye could see.
...Akira could only stand there, unable to move.
His hands, grabbing at Natsumi's arms... floated along with his shadow...... and eventually separated from her.
Then, for only a moment... he saw Natsumi don a gentle smile.
That was right. ...Akira abandoned Natsumi in his heart the moment she suddenly changed... and he fled from her.
Just as he was able to see all of Natsumi, Natsumi too was able to see the truth of his thoughts.
He wondered if Natsumi expected things to end this way...?
From the moment... she cried that she loved him.
"...Akira-kun...... this is your fault..."
And when she uttered those words.
The bond between the two of them... was forever torn.
"...Natsumi... it's all right... it's all right..."
Akira gently hugged Natsumi's lifeless body.
"It's all right... this is a dream... it's a dream..."
He continued muttering those words in an attempt to convince himself. Even though he was painfully aware... the one he most wanted to answer him would never speak again.
Little by little... the warmth faded from Natsumi's delicate body. Never wanting to let her go... Akira tightly embraced Natsumi, covered in blood.
He wanted to fall asleep... together with Natsumi... in a dream...
Akira continued to wish... only for that... as his consciousness faded away...

"Minai car to Kakiuchi PS.@k@vS04/28/310500330. ...This is first division assistant director Minai.@k@vS04/28/310500331. Arrived at the high school of Natsumi Kimiyoshi, survivor of the Kimiyoshi family massacre incident the other day.@k@vS04/28/310500332. Discovered the person in question in a corner of the rooftop of the school building."

"......Natsumi Kimiyoshi was dead on arrival.@k@vS04/28/310500334. The cause of death was excessive blood loss.@k@vS04/28/310500335. The first to discover the body was a male classmate, showing signs of minor injuries."

"After administering first aid, he voluntarily submitted to questioning, but we made the decision on site to cease questioning upon witnessing the debilitation in his mind and body.@k@vS04/28/310500337. On-site investigation will continue.@k@vS04/28/310500338. ...Over."
"Kakiuchi PS to Inspector Minai.@k@vS04/00/VT1B_centP1013. Understood.@k@vS04/00/VT1B_centP1014. Please continue your investigation.@k@vS04/00/VT1B_centP1015. Over."
"Roger.@k@vS04/28/310500340. Over and out..."
"...Damn iiiit!!!"
Unable to control my anger, I punched the hood of the car. ......I could see my fist gushing with blood, but the pain of that wound was nothing compared to the pain in my heart.
"Minai-san..."
Again! Again I failed to protect them...!
I swore this would be the end... I swore this would be the end of the tragedy in Hinamizawa!!
What was all that crap you said about hating to break promises! What nerve you have, Tomoe Minai!!
What good does having the power of the state do when I can't save the life of an innocent civilian... and such a young girl, at that?!
"What the hell,@k@vS04/28/310500343. ...what the hell is all this?!@k@vS04/28/310500344. Are you saying this is also the work of Oyashiro-sama's curse?!@k@vS04/28/310500345. Ooishi-san?!"
And so...... I directed a question toward the old detective who was no longer in this world.
The more I investigate, the more I'm driven into this labyrinth, this chain of nightmares.
The closer I get, the more the door of truth shuts.
In the face of such a baffling mystery... what can I do by challenging it alone?!
I can only say this. No, I have to say it.
The curse of Hinamizawa is not over yet.
The great disaster didn't mark the end of everything.
And I'm sure it will continue for a long time. This tragedy will repeat over and over again in some other city.
Until the day the name Hinamizawa weathers and fades from people's memories for all time...
.........Ah, that's it.
It won't end like this. ...No, I won't let it end like this!!
I swear I'll blow the lid on this ruthless tragic nightmare of an incident, even if it costs me my life!!
"Like hell I'll let it end!!@k@vS04/28/310500347. I won't forget!!@k@vS04/28/310500348. Never...!!"
...July, 1983.@k@rA complete blockade of Hinamizawa village@rwas established as of a few days after the incident.
